SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNField

Packages that use AbstractNField
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.commons.utils
General purpose utility classes for common operations.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils
NIB Batch utilities
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.
com.nib.supernaut.jms
Java Message Service (JMS) integration for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.jms.api
Supernaut JMS API
com.nib.supernaut.systran
System transactions for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.

    Defines the procedure that must be implemented by subclasses to specify the program's execution logic.

    Executes the logic of the program.

    Method
    Description
    protected void
    AbstractFile.from(AbstractNField from)
    Copies the content from the specified AbstractNField source to the current instance.
    protected void
    AbstractFile.from(AbstractNField from, int recordLength)
    Copies data from a given field into the current record, adjusting length and filling remaining space with blank characters if necessary.

    Advancing.Positioning(AbstractNField f)
    Creates an Advancing instance based on a data field value.

    AbstractFile.readNext(AbstractNField into)
    Reads the next record into the specified field.

    Assigns a record to the file using the specified field.

    AbstractFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, EncodingType encoding)

    AbstractFile.write(AbstractNField from)

    Writes the record from the specified field for teh specified length

    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing, AbstractNField from)
    Writes data to the file after performing an operation on the provided record field and advancing according to the specified advancing behavior.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.writeAfter(Advancing advancing, AbstractNField from, int reclen)
    Writes data to the file after performing operations on the provided record field and advancing based on the specified advancing behavior and record length.

    Description

    KeySequentialFile.alternateRecordKeyIs(AbstractNField key)
    Sets the alternate record key for the KeySequentialFile instance using the specified AbstractNField.

    AbstractKeySequentialFile.deleteGeneric(AbstractNField key, int len)
    Deletes all records matching the provided key and for the provided length.

    Deletes all records matching the provided key and for the provided length.
    FileIOResponse
    KeySequentialFile.last(AbstractNField field)
    Retrieves the last record in the file based on the specified field.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rba)
    Reads a record from the sequential file using the specified field and relative buffer address (RBA).

    Reads a record from the sequential file using the specified parameters and stores the data into the provided field.

    AbstractKeySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField key)
    Reads a record from the file using the specified key.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractKeySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField key, boolean equal)
    Reads a record from the file using the specified key and matching condition.
    abstract FileIOResponse
    AbstractKeySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField key, boolean equal, boolean update)
    Reads a record from the file using the specified key, matching condition, and update flag.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractKeySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField into, AbstractNField key)
    Reads data from a given key field into a specified field.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractKeySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField into, AbstractNField key, boolean equal, boolean update)
    Reads data from a file based on the specified key and conditions, and optionally updates the provided field.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractRecordRelativeFile.read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rrn)
    Reads a record from the file into the specified data field based on the given relative record number (RRN).
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractRecordRelativeFile.read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rrn, boolean equal, boolean update)
    Reads a record from the file into the specified data field based on the given relative record number (RRN), equality condition, and update flag.
    FileIOResponse
    KeySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField field, boolean equal, boolean update)
    Reads a record from the key-sequential file based on the specified key field and conditions, and optionally updates the record.

    AbstractKeySequentialFile.readInto(AbstractNField into)
    Reads data into the specified field.

    EntrySequentialFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record)
    Sets the record to be used for processing in this EntrySequentialFile instance.

    Sets the record for the KeySequentialFile instance using the specified AbstractNField.
    KeySequentialFile
    KeySequentialFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, NInteger recordLength)
    Sets the record for the KeySequentialFile instance with the specified AbstractNField as the record and NInteger as the record length.

    Sets the record for the current instance of RecordRelativeFile and returns the instance itself.

    Starts the file browsing from the specified field using the specified mode.

  • Uses of AbstractNField in com.nib.commons.storage

    Subclasses of AbstractNField in com.nib.commons.storage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractNDecimal
    AbstractNDecimal is an abstract class designed to handle numeric values with a specified number of significant digits and adjustable decimal precision.
    class 
    AbstractNElementary
    AbstractNElementary represents an abstract definition for an elementary field within a memory structure.
    class 
    AbstractNFloatingPoint
    AbstractNFloatingPoint is an abstract class representing a floating-point numeric data type.
    class 
    AbstractNNumeric
    Represents an abstract representation of a numeric field.
    class 
    NBinary
    NBinary is a subclass of AbstractNElementary and represents a binary field in memory with specific behavior and customizations.
    class 
    NChar
    Represents a character-based data structure that provides functionality for handling string, byte, and character values.
    class 
    NCharBin
    The NCharBin class extends the functionality of the NChar class.
    class 
    NCharInspected
    The NCharInspected class extends the NChar class by providing additional functionality to inspect and replace characters or substrings within the character sequence.
    class 
    NDouble
    NDouble is a concrete implementation of the AbstractNFloatingPoint class, representing a double-precision floating-point numeric data type.
    class 
    NFloat
    The NFloat class represents a single-precision floating-point numeric type.
    class 
    NGroup
    The NGroup class is a representation of a storage group that allows for hierarchical data organization and manipulation.
    class 
    NInt16
    Represents a signed 16-bit integer (2-byte) data type.
    class 
    NInt32
    Represents a 32-bit signed integer within the numeric data types hierarchy.
    class 
    NInt64
    The NInt64 class represents a 64-bit signed integer data type.
    class 
    NInteger
    The NInteger class provides an implementation for handling numeric integer variables.
    class 
    NPacked
    The NPacked class represents a packed decimal data type typically used in memory-based numerical operations.
    class 
    NPointer
    Persistent pointer to a memory location.
    class 
    NUInt16
    The NUInt16 class represents an unsigned 16-bit integer.
    class 
    NUInt32
    The NUInt32 class represents a 32-bit unsigned integer in a specific data area structure.
    class 
    NVarcharField
    The NVarcharField class is a data field representation that supports variable-length string values, with options to define and manage the maximum length of characters.
    class 
    NZoned
    Represents a numeric, zoned-decimal formatted field with support for variable length, decimal places, and optional signed values.
    class 
    SpecialRegister
    The SpecialRegister class is a specialized extension of the NChar class used for creating and managing special register instances with predefined initial values.

    AbstractNField.getOccursInstance(AbstractNField[] field, int index)

    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage that return AbstractNField
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.allocate()
    Allocates memory for the field using the specified length and updates the internal state of the object accordingly.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.ascii()
    Sets the storage method to ASCII by disabling EBCDIC storage.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.clone()
    Creates and returns a copy of the current field instance.
    AbstractNField
    NGroup.clone()
     
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.ebcdic()
    Sets the EBCDIC storage flag to true, indicating that the field should use EBCDIC storage encoding.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.highValues()
    Sets the value of the field to the maximum byte value (0xff).
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target)
    Inspects the characters in the provided source field within the current value of the field instance and converts them based on the target specifications.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target, Integer offset, Integer length)
    Inspects the source AbstractNField, extracts its character sequence, and converts the specified segment of characters into a target character sequence replacing the current value of the field instance.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(String source, String target)
    Inspects the source and target strings and performs character conversion within the current value of the field instance as needed.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(String source, String target, Integer offset, Integer length)
    Inspects and converts characters in the specified portion of the current value of the field instance on the mapping between characters in the source and target strings.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.justified(AbstractNField.Justified value)
    Sets the justification value for this field.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.lowValues()
    Sets the value in the field to the lowest possible value (0x00) and returns the modified field object.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.redefines(IDataArea field)
    Redefines the current field using the provided data area.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.replaceAll(String target, String replace)
    Replaces all occurrences of a target string within the current value of the field instance with a specified replacement string.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.spaces()
    Sets all fields to a space character based on the specified storage type (EBCDIC or ASCII) and returns the current instance.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.zeros()
    Sets all elements in the field to zero, based on the specified encoding (EBCDIC or ASCII), and returns the current instance.
    AbstractNField
    AbstractNNumeric.zeros()
    Sets the current value to zero and returns the instance of the field.
    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage that return types with arguments of type AbstractNField
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AbstractNField>
    NGroup.getAllChildren()
    Retrieves a list of all child fields associated with the current instance, including nested child fields within child groups (if any).
    List<AbstractNField>
    NGroup.getChildren()
    Retrieves the list of child fields associated with the current instance.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractNField.assignAddress(AbstractNField source)
    Assigns the address of the given source field, using the offset of the source field's address.
    void
    AbstractNField.assignAddress(AbstractNField source, int offset)
    Assigns an address to the current object based on the given source field and offset.
    void
    NGroup.assignAddress(AbstractNField field)
     
    void
    Memory.checkFit(AbstractNField field)
     
    int
    AbstractNField.compare(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field with another field based on their byte values.
    int
    StringValue.compare(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current object with the specified AbstractNField object lexicographically.
    int
    AbstractNField.countCharsAfter(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Counts the number of characters within the current value of the field instance after the specified delimiter.
    int
    AbstractNField.countCharsBefore(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Counts the number of characters before a given delimiter in the current value of the field instance.
    int
    AbstractNField.countCharsBetween(AbstractNField delimiterStart, AbstractNField delimiterEnd)
    Counts the number of characters between the specified start and end delimiters within the current value of the field instance.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.equals(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the the current field instance with the specified field for equality.
    void
    JsonObject.generate(AbstractNField source)

    T
    AbstractNField.getOccursInstance(AbstractNField[] field, int index)
    Retrieves an instance from an array of AbstractNField objects at the specified index.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.greaterEqualThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field instance with the provided field instance and determines if the current field instance is greater than or equal to the specified field.
    boolean
    StringValue.greaterEqualThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares this object with the specified field and determines if the current instance is greater than or equal to the given field.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.greaterThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares this current field instance to the specified field and determines if it is greater.
    boolean
    StringValue.greaterThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current object with the specified field to determine if it is greater.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target)
    Inspects the characters in the provided source field within the current value of the field instance and converts them based on the target specifications.
    <T> AbstractNField
    AbstractNField.inspectAndConvertCharacters(AbstractNField source, NChar target, Integer offset, Integer length)
    Inspects the source AbstractNField, extracts its character sequence, and converts the specified segment of characters into a target character sequence replacing the current value of the field instance.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.lessEqualThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field instance with the given field to determine if it is less than or equal to it.
    boolean
    StringValue.lessEqualThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current object with the provided field to determine if it is less than or equal to the specified field.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.lessThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field instance with the specified field to determine if it is less than.
    boolean
    StringValue.lessThan(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current object with the specified field and determines whether the current object is less than the specified field.
    void
    AbstractNField.memcpy(AbstractNField target, int sourceOffset, int targetOffset, int length)
    Copies a sequence of bytes from the current field storage to a target field.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target)
    Copies the byte data from the current field to the specified target field.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target, int length)
    Copies a specified number of bytes to the target field from the current field's storage.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target, int offset, int length)
    Copies a segment of bytes from the current address storage to the specified target field.
    void
    AbstractNField.moveTo(AbstractNField target, int sourceOffset, int targetOffset, int length)
    Copies a sequence of bytes from the current address storage to the target field.
    boolean
    AbstractNField.notEquals(AbstractNField field)
    Compares the current field instance with the given field to determine inequality.
    void
    JsonObject.parse(AbstractNField source, boolean withDetail)
     
    void
    AbstractNField.setString(int offset, int length, AbstractNField source)
    Sets a portion of the string from the source object to the current field instance.
    void
    AbstractNField.setValue(AbstractNField source, int length)
    Sets the value by copying data from the given source field and padding as necessary using blank spaces till the specified length when the instance length is shorter.
    void
    AbstractNField.setValue(AbstractNField source, int offset, int length)
    Sets the value of the current instance of AbstractNField by copying data from the specified source field starting at the specified offset for the specified length.
    void
    AbstractNField.setValue(AbstractNField source, int sourceOffset, int targetOffset, int length)
    Sets the value of the current instance of AbstractNField copying the content of another source field, from the sourceOffset position to the targetOffset position for the specified length.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.substringToValue(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Extracts a substring from the current value of the field instance representation of this object up to the first occurrence of the given delimiter.

    Description

    Dfheiblk
    This class represents the DFHEIBLK structure in CICS.
    class 
    GetMainStorageId
    This class extends NChar and is used to get the main storage ID.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    SupernautContext.StackEntry.getCommarea()
    Returns the communication area associated with this stack entry.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressCommarea(AbstractNField ca, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the COMMAREA and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressCwa(AbstractNField field, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the CWA (Common Work Area) and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressTwa(AbstractNField twaField, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the TWA (Task Work Area) and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignAbcode(AbstractNField abcode, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the abend code to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignApplid(AbstractNField applid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the application identifier (APPLID) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignChannel(AbstractNField channel, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the current channel name to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignFacility(AbstractNField sc, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the name of the facility that initated task to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignNetname(AbstractNField netname, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the terminal NETNAME to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignOpclass(AbstractNField opclass, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the OPCLASS (Operator Class) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignOpid(AbstractNField opid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the OPID (Operator ID) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignStartCode(AbstractNField sc, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the task start code to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignSysid(AbstractNField sysid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the system identifier (SYSID) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignUserid(AbstractNField userid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the user ID to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignUsername(AbstractNField username, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the username to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.bifDeedit(AbstractNField field, int length, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Executes a BIF DEEDIT command to process a field by removing non-numeric characters and applying zoned sign encoding if necessary.
    DeqCommand
    SupernautContext.deqResource(AbstractNField s)
    Creates a DEQ command for resource management.
    EnqCommand
    SupernautContext.enqResource(AbstractNField s)
    Creates an ENQ command for resource management.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.freemain(AbstractNField ptr, boolean pointer, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Releases previously allocated GETMAIN shared storage.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.link(String program, AbstractNField commarea, int length, String sysid, String transid, Channel channel, boolean synconreturn, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Invoke (LINK) a program with the specified parameters.
    protected abstract int
    AbstractOnlineProgram.procedure(AbstractNField dfhcommarea)
    Abstract method that must be implemented by subclasses to define specific transaction logic.

    AbstractOnlineProgram.procedure(AbstractNField... args)
    Executes the procedure logic using the provided arguments.

    SupernautContext.xctl(String program, AbstractNField commarea, int length, Channel channel, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
